tasks.task: Fix fast event context error in preview.lua
tasks.description: Wrap vim.fn.readfile call in vim.schedule to avoid E5560 error in async callback.

steps.description: Wrap vim.fn.readfile call in vim.schedule callback
Run tests to verify the fix works correctly

tasks.acceptance-criteria: PlantumlCreateUTXT command executes without E5560 error. Preview window displays generated UTXT content correctly. Auto-refresh on save continues to work.

unit: Mock vim.system callback invokes vim.schedule correctly
vim.schedule callback reads file content and passes to outer callback
integration: PlantumlCreateUTXT command creates UTXT file and shows preview window
Preview window displays correct content from generated UTXT file
Auto-refresh updates preview buffer on BufWritePost event
e2e-manual: Open a .puml file and run PlantumlCreateUTXT, verify no error appears
Verify preview window shows correct ASCII diagram
